items.name: Topping, Peanut Butter Cup
actions: This is a miscount — the inventory wasn't counted correctly. Recount it.

items.name: Shake Mix
actions: Watch portioning and confirm the build/prep spec.
Verify employee meals are being rung and review waste.
Recount on-hand — check for a miscount or receiving error.

items.name: Ground Beef
actions: Spot-check patty weight — patties must be rolled at 3.5 oz.
Reduce waste — drop patties off the register callbacks, don't pre-drop.
Audit comps & employee meals — every free build has to be rung.
